name: chonkers
description: Chonkers — checkers, but you stack instead of capture

scripts.test:e2e:ci: if [ -d e2e ]; then playwright test --grep-invert '@nightly|@governor|@axe|@pap'; else echo 'no e2e specs yet — skipping'; fi
scripts.test:e2e:nightly: if [ -d e2e ]; then playwright test --grep @nightly; else echo 'no e2e specs yet — skipping'; fi
scripts.test:e2e:governor: if [ -d e2e ]; then playwright test --grep @governor; else echo 'no e2e specs yet — skipping'; fi
scripts.test:e2e:a11y: if [ -d e2e ]; then playwright test --grep @axe --project chromium; else echo 'no e2e specs yet — skipping'; fi
scripts.test:e2e:pap: if [ -d e2e ]; then playwright test --grep @pap --project chromium; else echo 'no e2e specs yet — skipping'; fi
scripts.native:android:debug: pnpm build:native && cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.native:ios:build: pnpm build:native && cap sync ios && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16'

author: arcade-cabinet
